    • matchState

      public State matchState(String stateName)
      Finds and returns a state which matches the passed name.
      Parameters:
      stateName - The name or abbreviation of the state.
      Returns:
      The matched state, if found, or null otherwise.

    • matchCongressionalDistrict

      public CongressionalDistrict matchCongressionalDistrict(String officeID)

    • matchCounties

      public List<County> matchCounties(Collection<String> names, State state)

    • matchMunicipality

      public Municipality matchMunicipality(String municipalityAndStateName)
      Finds and matches a municipality from a string containing the name of the municipality and the name or abbreviation of a state.
      Parameters:
      municipalityAndStateName - A String contining the municipality name and and state names or abbreviation, separated by a comma ,
      Returns:
      The found municipality if successfully matched, or null otherwise.

    • matchMunicipality

      public Municipality matchMunicipality(String municipalityName, State state)

    • matchMunicipality

      public Municipality matchMunicipality(String municipalityName, String state)
      Finds and returns the municipality that matches the passed values.
      Parameters:
      municipalityName - Name of the municipality, without a state abbreviation.
      state - Either the name or abbreviation of a state.
      Returns:
      The found municipality, or null if not found.

    • matchMunicipality

      public Municipality matchMunicipality(String municipalityName, int population, double area)
      This method to be used before cities have assigned states. Assumes all cities are unique by (name, population, area)

    • matchAirport

      public Airport matchAirport(String airportName)
      Finds and returns the airport with a full name, common name, or IATA code matching the passed string.
      Parameters:
      airportName - Full or Common name, or IATA code, of an airport.
      Returns:
      Matched airport, if found, or null otherwise.

    • matchUniversity

      public University matchUniversity(String universityName)
      Finds and returns the university with a full name or common name matching the passed string.
      Parameters:
      universityName - Full or Common name of a university.
      Returns:
      Matched university, if found, or null otherwise.

      Turn this object's fields into an accurately-modeled JSONObject.

    • fromJson

      public Manager fromJson(core.JSONObject json)
      Description copied from interface: Jsonic
      Interpret a JSONObject into an object of this type.
      Parameters:
      json - A JSONObject containing any number of the fields for this object as key-value pairs.
      Returns:
      The Object interpreted from the Json. Note that this object's fields will also be set.
